_comment: Evergreen 'organizations that welcome volunteers' directory. Sourced from /Users/stephendavis/Desktop/newsletter/reference/research/06-volunteer-starter-data.json (19 Chittenden County orgs, each individually verified live 2026-07-17). blurb text is original wording written for this dataset, not copied from any org's site. tags use the same quick/outdoor/onetime/recurring/friends vocabulary as data/volunteers/fresh.json, but are left empty unless the org's own blurb explicitly says so (e.g. 'ongoing', 'nightly', 'group volunteer days') — never guessed from category or vibes. To add an org: copy any entry, append, done.
review_cadence: Monthly spot-check: confirm each url still resolves and the org is still recruiting volunteers (the way this dataset caught Shelburne Farms no longer accepting volunteers during the original research pass). Not a freshness field on individual records — update last_checked when an entry is actually reverified.

organizations.blurb: Hands-on farm and land-stewardship volunteering at Burlington's working agricultural hub.
Sorting, packing, and distributing food to fight hunger across Chittenden and neighboring counties.
Shelter-based volunteer roles supporting Burlington's main emergency housing and family shelter provider.
Ongoing volunteer roles caring for shelter animals, with a minimum 6-month commitment requested.
Nightly meal volunteers and project help for adults experiencing homelessness in Burlington.
Trained hotline and advocacy volunteers supporting survivors of domestic violence in Chittenden County.
Youth mentoring, tutoring, and group volunteer days at a South End Burlington youth and family center.
Volunteer support for Vermont's statewide biking, walking, and safe-streets advocacy nonprofit.
Trail maintenance, visitor help, and wood-carving support at a small natural-history museum in Huntington.
Meals on Wheels delivery drivers bringing food to older Vermonters around greater Burlington.
Mentoring and program support helping shape young lives at Burlington's Boys & Girls Club.
Volunteer support for shelter, meals, counseling, and mentoring programs serving youth ages 12-30.
Volunteer home-repair teams (including skilled-trade roles) revitalizing homes for low-income Chittenden County residents.
Facility, event, and program volunteers at Burlington's waterfront sailing and lake-access nonprofit.
Build-site and ReStore volunteers supporting affordable homeownership projects in the Burlington area.

organizations.org: ECHO, Leahy Center for Lake Champlain
organizations.blurb: Visitor engagement and animal-care volunteers at Burlington's lakefront science and nature museum.
Shelving, holds, and project volunteers (age 14+) at Burlington's public library system.
Hospital-based volunteer roles (age 17+) supporting patients and staff at UVM Medical Center and Golisano Children's Hospital.
An all-volunteer-run food shelf that always needs help unloading, sorting, and shelving donations.
